'''Brothic''' was the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of [[Ciutric IV]].

==Biography==
Although he was a partisan of [[Sate Pestage/Legends|Sate Pestage]], he placed him under arrest on orders of the [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends|Tribunal]] when Pestage arrived on Ciutric.

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 32|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 32]] {{1st}}
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 33|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 33]] {{Imo}}
